tagline: Starfleet operations — diplomacy, exploration, and engineering

account.name: United Federation of Planets HQ (Test Data)

serviceLines.name: ST:TR Strategy & Advisory
serviceLines.description: Command-tier strategic engagements. Discovery, roadmaps, executive advisory.

serviceLines.name: ST:TR Implementation
serviceLines.description: Build + delivery away teams. Greenfield platforms, integrations, migrations.

serviceLines.name: ST:TR Managed Services
serviceLines.description: Long-running operational engagements. Retainer-style ongoing support.

serviceLines.name: ST:TR Data & Analytics
serviceLines.description: Insight engagements. BI, dashboards, science officer reports.

serviceLines.name: ST:TR Knowledge & Training
serviceLines.description: Enablement engagements. Academy curriculum delivery, training, documentation.

roles.name: Vulcan Logician (SA)
roles.description: Logic incarnate — designs the over-arching solution and watches over its integrity with cold precision.

roles.name: Starfleet Captain (PM)
roles.description: Marshals the crew of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to Starfleet Command.

roles.name: Senior Engineer (SCC)
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft — runs the engine room of the build phase.

roles.name: Ensign (CC)
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior officer's command.

roles.name: Science Officer (BA)
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the engineering deck.

roles.name: Communications Officer (SMCC)
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — opens hailing frequencies across the quadrant.

_realmNotes: Star Trek realms span the major arcs: Federation flagship operations (enterprise-d-bridge, vulcan-science, starfleet-academy), Cardassian/Dominion decommissioning (dominion-decommission, federation-archives), commerce + diplomatic (ferengi-commerce, risa-resort), and Deep Space Nine + Klingon Empire ops (deep-space-nine, klingon-shipyard). Pre-sales is starfleet-academy (Internal billing).

prepayments.notes: Up-front latinum escrow per Rule of Acquisition #1.

enterprise-d-bridge.name: Bridge Briefing
enterprise-d-bridge.description: Discovery sign-off — bridge crew briefed in the Ready Room.

enterprise-d-bridge.name: Console Replacement Done
enterprise-d-bridge.description: Build kickoff: helm + ops consoles swapped over.

enterprise-d-bridge.name: Captain's Sign-off
enterprise-d-bridge.description: Mid-project gate: captain reviews the build progress.

dominion-decommission.name: Treaty Signed
dominion-decommission.description: Build phase: peace treaty with the Vorta.

dominion-decommission.name: Vessels Secured
dominion-decommission.description: UAT gate: Dominion ships in tractor lock.

deep-space-nine.name: Promenade Hardened
deep-space-nine.description: Build: security mesh + pylon reinforcement done.

deep-space-nine.name: Sisko's Review
deep-space-nine.description: Solution review with the station commander.

ferengi-commerce.name: Council with the Nagus
ferengi-commerce.description: Kickoff council with Grand Nagus Zek.

ferengi-commerce.name: Ferengi Acceptance
ferengi-commerce.description: UAT acceptance: profit margins signed off.

ferengi-commerce.name: Final Recompense
ferengi-commerce.description: Final invoice from the Ferengi Authority.

William Riker.notes: Trombone gig at the holodeck lounge.

Benjamin Sisko.notes: Sojourn to the Prophets — Bajoran orb retreat.

tasks.name: Assemble the Bridge Crew
tasks.description: Run the kickoff workshop and align on scope, roles, and timeline.

tasks.name: Survey the System
tasks.description: Gather and document requirements with the client stakeholders.

tasks.name: Plot the Course
tasks.description: Produce the solution design and review it with the client.

tasks.name: Engage Warp Engines
tasks.description: Build and configure the solution per the approved design.

tasks.name: Run the Kobayashi Maru
tasks.description: Run user acceptance testing and triage the feedback.

tasks.name: Boldly Go
tasks.description: Execute the go-live cutover and confirm production readiness.

tasks.name: Establish the Starbase
tasks.description: Stand up the managed-service environment and runbooks.

tasks.name: Brief the Crew
tasks.description: Hold the service kickoff and confirm SLAs and escalation paths.

tasks.name: Calibrate the Computer Core
tasks.description: Implement monitoring, automation, and support processes.

tasks.name: Transfer Command
tasks.description: Transition the service into active management.

tasks.name: Captain's Log Review
tasks.description: Stabilize the service and review the first support cycle.

tasks.name: Muster the Away Team
tasks.description: Kick off the initiative and confirm goals and owners.

tasks.name: Long-Range Scan
tasks.description: Assess the current state and define success criteria.

tasks.name: Plot the Mission
tasks.description: Draft the approach and circulate it for internal review.

tasks.name: The Away Mission
tasks.description: Execute the work and track progress to plan.

tasks.name: First Contact
tasks.description: Roll out internally and communicate the change.

tasks.name: Orders from Starfleet
tasks.description: Align with the stakeholder on scope and deadline.

tasks.name: Mission Briefing
tasks.description: Capture the requirements for the deliverable.

tasks.name: Complete the Away Mission
tasks.description: Complete the deliverable.

tasks.name: File the Captain's Log
tasks.description: Deliver and review the work with the stakeholder.
